description: Key moments in our journey from idea to industry leader.

items.title: 2019 - Founded
items.description: Started with a team of 3 in a co-working space with a vision to simplify enterprise workflows.

items.title: 2020 - Series A
items.description: Raised $12M to expand our engineering team and launch our first enterprise product.

items.title: 2022 - 1,000 Customers
items.description: Crossed the 1,000 paying customer milestone with a Net Promoter Score of 72.

items.title: 2024 - Global Expansion
items.description: Opened offices in London and Singapore, serving customers in 40+ countries.
